publishProtocolMatrix.publisherAction: Publishers must attach registry, manifest, digest, signature, permission, source, template, compatibility, and failure-isolation evidence before announcing a plugin.
publishProtocolMatrix.rollbackOrEscalation: Disable the candidate plugin or keep the previous digest-matched version pinned when any publish protocol surface fails conformance.

protocolCompatibility.publisherAction: Do not publish old-protocol-only plugins for a protocol 1 host.
protocolCompatibility.rollbackOrEscalation: Pin the previous plugin release or upgrade the plugin manifest to include protocol 1 before install.

protocolCompatibility.publisherAction: Publish only after registry checksum, manifest permissions, and dry-run evidence pass.
protocolCompatibility.rollbackOrEscalation: Disable the plugin release if digest, permission, or dry-run evidence regresses.

protocolCompatibility.publisherAction: Select protocol 1 behavior until the host upgrades to the future protocol.
protocolCompatibility.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the current protocol path active when future-only behavior is not understood by the host.

protocolCompatibility.publisherAction: Block publication for hosts that do not negotiate the future protocol.
protocolCompatibility.rollbackOrEscalation: Require a host upgrade or republish with current protocol compatibility before enabling the plugin.

failureIsolationPolicy.publisherAction: Treat rejected conformance cases as publish blockers and attach the JSON conformance report to release notes.
failureIsolationPolicy.rollbackOrEscalation: Disable or pin the previous plugin release when any failure-isolation case regresses.

p9PublishHardening.compatibilityPolicy: Old-only and future-only plugins are rejected; current and future-plus-current plugins may publish only when digest, signature, source allowlist, permission, template contract, and no-partial-write evidence pass.

digestPinning.publishRequirement: Every published plugin and template pack must pin a sha256 digest before cache promotion or generated output application.

templateContractVersioning.rollbackOrEscalation: Pin the previous template contract or republish with contractVersion 1 when template metadata drifts.

noPartialWriteEvidence.rollbackOrEscalation: Reject publication and keep the previous digest-matched plugin active when partial-write isolation regresses.

p9PublishHardening.publisherAction: Publishers must attach source allowlist, signature trust source, digest pinning, compatibility, permission, template contract version, and no-partial-write evidence before announcing a plugin.
p9PublishHardening.rollbackOrEscalation: Disable the candidate plugin, pin the previous digest-matched artifact, and require a clean conformance rerun when any P9 publish hardening row fails.
